creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I see in the log there is a problem with the XHCI controller, not the Focusrite.

19:56:09.868398 usbus1.2 DONE-ISOC-EP=00000001,SPD=HIGH,NFR=0,SLEN=0,IVAL=0,ERR=TIMEOUT

It looks like it didn't generate a completion event for an isochronous job, so the isochronous schedule stopped feeding audio.

Try to build a new kernel with:

options USB_DEBUG

added to the kernel config.

Then set for example:

sysctl hw.usb.xhci.debug=17
sleep 10
sysctl hw.usb.xhci.debug=0

Then repeat the test and collect logs from /var/log/messages

--HPS
